description: Smarty provides address intelligence services such as address verification, autocomplete, geocoding, and related enrichment data. Its products focus on validating and standardizing postal and location data for US and international use cases.
summary: Smarty exposes authenticated HTTP APIs for address validation, autocomplete, geocoding, enrichment, ZIP/postal lookup, and extract workflows, plus an authenticated MCP server at `https://mcp.api.smarty.com/`; no public GraphQL API or standalone CLI surface was confirmed.
